purpose: Define negative proofs showing that public inspection surfaces cannot be interpreted as issuance, media admission, replay pass, admissibility verdict, or terminal closure.
negative_proof_rule: A public surface is admissible only if it proves the absence of issuance, media admission, replay pass, verdict, and terminal closure unless the corresponding future authority object exists.
forbidden_positive_readings: any public inspection surface admits media
any public inspection surface proves replay passed
any public inspection surface creates an admissibility verdict
any public inspection surface creates terminal closure
